emails.subject: FW: Producer Payment Summary
emails.body: FW: Producer Payment Summary Gerald, here is the payment and wire transfer information for the Kern shippers listing... pls incorporate into each agreement and raise working documents for all shippers with the exception of Crestone, I will get back to you on them. thanks, B.T.

emails.subject: FW: Producer Payment Summary
emails.body: FW: Producer Payment Summary Gerald, here is the payment and wire transfer information for the Kern shippers listing... pls incorporate into each agreement and raise working documents for all shippers with the exception of Crestone, I will get back to you on them. thanks, B.T.

emails.subject: Re: FW: Producer Payment Summary
emails.body: Re: FW: Producer Payment Summary I will prepare the documents. Attached is the contract form that Crestone forwarded for their payment. This would be a schedule to an existing Master Services Agreement in place between ENA and Crestone.

emails.subject: Re: FW: Producer Payment Summary
emails.body: Re: FW: Producer Payment Summary I will prepare the documents. Attached is the contract form that Crestone forwarded for their payment. This would be a schedule to an existing Master Services Agreement in place between ENA and Crestone.
